title: Operational Bulletins 2012 - Canada.ca
content:
## Operational Bulletins 2012
In exceptional circumstances, operational bulletins may also be issued for one-time-only instructions or to provide urgent instructions to staff for a brief period while the relevant operational chapters are being updated.
- OB 484 – May 27, 2013 (Modified) Processing work permits for Designated Country of Origin and Non-Designated Country of Origin refugee claimants
- OB 486 – December 17, 2012 Global Launch of Electronic Applications (e-Apps) for Temporary Residents
- OB 440-H – December 17, 2012 Changes to the Pre-Removal Risk Assessment Program under the new legislation
- OB 485 – December 15, 2012 (Expired) Bridging Open Work Permits for Certain Federal Economic Class Applicants
- OB 487 – December 14, 2012 Replacement of the Protected Person Status Document
- OB 483 – June 19, 2013 (Modified) (Expired) In-Canada Itinerant Services – Procedures and Guidelines
- OB 479-A – November 29, 2012 (Expired) Temporary Public Policy to Facilitate Permanent Residence for Certain Federal Skilled Worker Applicants was terminated: Actions Required of Visa Offices
- OB 481 – November 21, 2012 Pilot Project to Print Confirmation of Permanent Residence (COPR) Documents and Permanent Resident Visa Counterfoils by the Case Processing Pilot-Ottawa (CPP-O)
- OB 476 – November 16, 2012 (Expired) Abandonment of citizenship grant applications where proof of residence has not been provided
- OB 440-F – November 9, 2012 Removal of 180-Day Time Limit for Protected Persons Applying for Permanent Residence
- OB 471 – October 31, 2012 (Expired) Changes to the Immigration Medical Examination Process
- OB 469 – October 31, 2012 (Expired) Changes to the Citizenship Regulations : Up-front Language Evidence
- OB 356 – October 19, 2012 Regulatory Changes to the Refugee Resettlement Program
- OB 442-C – October 12, 2012 (Expired) Return of Fees for Certain Federal Skilled Worker Applications: Actions Required of Visa Offices
- OB 279-D – September 27, 2012 (Expired) Alberta Pilot for Occupation-Specific Work Permits – Expanded to include 6 (six) additional occupations
- OB 223-C – September 13, 2012 (Expired) Transition of the China Transit Trial into the China Transit Program
- OB 464 – September 11, 2012 New Temporary Resident Visa Requirement for Botswana, Namibia, Saint Lucia, Saint Vincent and the Grenadines and Swaziland
- OB 468 – August 31, 2012 (Expired) Extension of Haiti Special Measures for Work Permits
- OB 440-D – August 30, 2012 Designated Foreign Nationals – Restrictions on Applications for Permanent Residence
- OB 466 – August 29, 2012 (Expired) Validation of the Certification d’acceptation du Québec (CAQ) – Revised Guidelines
- OB 465 – August 24, 2012 Centralized Processing of Applications for Verification of Status or Replacement of an Immigration Document
- OB 440-E – August 15, 2012 (Expired) Processing Existing Pre-Removal Risk Assessment (PRRA) Applications and Subsequent PRRAs that Are Subject to, or Exempted From, the 12-Month Bar
- OB 461 – August 3, 2012 Requests for Humanitarian and Compassionate (H&C) Consideration Citing the November 2011 Temporary Pause on Acceptance of New Sponsorship Applications
- OB 450 – July 31, 2012 New In-Canada 2D Temporary Resident Application Forms
- OB 460 – July 27, 2012 (Expired) Acceptance of Handling of Public Money Receipts at Local CIC Offices in Canada for Global Case Management Systems Applications
- OB 458 – July 25, 2012 Special Events – Visa Fee Exempt Special Events: August, September and October 2012
- OB 449 – July 13, 2012 (Expired) Work Permit applications for Temporary Foreign Workers for businesses in sectors where there are reasonable grounds to suspect a risk of sexual exploitation of some workers
- OB 146-A – July 13, 2012 (Expired) Alberta Pilot Project for Spouses and Common-Law Partners of Long-Haul Truck Drivers
- OB 434 – July 9, 2012 Clarifying the responsibilities of Service Canada, Citizenship and Immigration Canada and the Canada Border Services Agency in regard to assessing a Temporary Foreign Worker's eligibility to work in Alberta in a compulsory certification trade position
- OB 123-A – July 9, 2012 (Expired) Pilot Project for Working-Age Dependent Children of Skilled Workers Destined to Ontario
- OB 122-A – July 9, 2012 (Expired) Pilot Project for Working-Age Dependent Children of Skilled Workers Destined to Alberta
- OB 436 – July 3, 2012 (Expired) Assisted Voluntary Return & Reintegration Pilot Program
- OB 438 – June 29, 2012 (Expired) Fifth Set of Ministerial Instructions: Temporary Pause on Certain Federal Skilled Worker and on Federal Immigrant Investor Applications
- OB 440-A – June 29, 2012 The new refugee determination system
- OB 433 – June 13, 2012 Centralization of Temporary Foreign Worker Units in Toronto, Ontario and Montréal, Québec
- OB 437 – June 13, 2012 The Importance of the Solicitor–Client Privilege Relationship
- OB 435 – June 11, 2012 (Expired) Additional Changes to the North American Processing Network
- OB 262-C – June 5, 2012 (Expired) Post Graduation Work Permit Program for International Students Graduating from Designated Private Post-Secondary Institutions in British Colombia – Revised Guidelines
- OB 420 – June 1, 2012 (Expired) LMO -exempt work permit renewals or extensions for some CSQ holders currently in Quebec
- OB 431 – June 1, 2012 In-Canada Office Closures and the Elimination of Front Counter Service
- OB 430 – May 31, 2012 (Expired) Centralized Intake of Federal Self-employed Persons Class and Quebec Business Class Applications
- OB 427 – May 29, 2012 (Expired) Restructuring of the North American Processing Network and Closure of the Visa Office at the Canadian Consulate General in Buffalo - Temporary Residence Program
- OB 426 – May 29, 2012 Pilot project for the issuance of temporary resident counterfoils for clients residing in Canada and holding valid study or work permits
- OB 425 – May 29, 2012 (Expired) Restructuring of the North American Processing Network and Closure of the Visa Office at the Canadian Consulate General in Buffalo – Permanent Residence Program
- OB 279-C – May 28, 2012 (Expired) Alberta Pilot for Occupation Specific Work Permits – Extending the steamfitter/pipefitter pilot
- OB 422 – May 25, 2012 Requesting Police Certificates from Mexico
- OB 419 – May 17, 2012 (Expired) Designated Medical Practitioner changed to Panel Physician
- OB 414 – May 9, 2012 (Expired) Closure of the Visa Office in Belgrade and Transfer of Temporary Resident Services
- OB 295-A – May 7, 2012 (Modified) Change in Procedures for Processing Quebec Family Class Applications
- OB 415 – April 30, 2012 (Expired) Closure and Transfer of Visa and Immigration Services from the Canadian Embassies in Berlin and Tokyo and Canadian High Commissions in Dhaka and Kuala Lumpur
- OB 417 – April 29, 2012 (Expired) Closure of the visa office in Tehran (Iran) and Transfer of its business lines to the Regional Program Centre in Ankara (Turkey)
- OB 413 – April 27, 2012 (Expired) Processing for Certain Federal Skilled Worker Backlog Applications: Budget 2012 – amended version
- OB 411 – April 26, 2012 Special Events – Visa Fee Exempt Special Events: May, June and July 2012
- OB 229-A – April 23, 2012 Pilot Project for Foreign Spouses and Dependent Children of High-Skilled Canadians or Permanent Residents Returning to Work in Ontario
- OB 406 – April 19, 2012 (Expired) Ontario Provincial Nominee Program (PNP) – Open work permits for Master’s or PhD graduates/nominees
- OB 401 – April 10, 2012 Coming into Force of Information Sharing Regulations (“Authorized Representatives”)
- OB 399 – April 10, 2012 (Expired) Guidance for officers assessing the temporary entry to Canada of foreign athletes, coaches and other essential members of foreign-based teams – R186(h)
- OB 403 – April 5, 2012 (Expired) MIDI will no longer issue CAQs for unpaid internships in Québec
- OB 400 – April 4, 2012 (Expired) Cessation of Processing for Certain Federal Skilled Worker Backlog Applications: Budget 2012
- OB 152-A – March 19, 2012 (Expired) Limited Validity Period for Labour Market Opinions
- OB 394 – March 8, 2012 (Expired) Validity of Arranged Employment Opinions
- OB 381 – March 8, 2012 (Expired) Assessing Who is a Parent for Citizenship Purposes Where Assisted Human Reproduction (AHR) and/or Surrogacy Arrangements are Involved
- OB 396 – March 7, 2012 Instructions to visa officers on making determinations on membership in the Family Class
- OB 395 – March 6, 2012 Sanctions against Syria
- OB 393 – March 5, 2012 (Expired) Release of the National Occupation Classification (NOC) 2011
- OB 392 – March 1, 2012 Transition Out of CIC Services When Newcomers Obtain Citizenship
- OB 391 – March 1, 2012 (Expired) Fee Exemption for Temporary Resident Permits Issued to Foreign Nationals in the Transit without Visa Program, the China Transit Trial and Emergency Landing Situations
- OB 389 – February 27, 2012 (Expired) Cost Recovery Fee Exemption for Temporary Resident Permits Issued to Foreign Nationals who are Inadmissible on Criminality Grounds
- OB 390 – February 24, 2012 (Expired) New Work Permit Access for Graduates of Recognized Public/Private Secondary Schools and Private Post-Secondary Institutions in Québec
- OB 225-F – February 23, 2012 End of Simplified Entry Process for Information Technology specialists for Quebec
- OB 385 – February 13, 2012 Instructions to create a GCMS application for sponsorship of unnamed children to be adopted and sibling adoption applications
- OB 325-B – February 6, 2012 New 2D bar code Sponsorship Form (IMM 1344)
- OB 223-B – February 1, 2012 Expansion of the China Transit Trial - Modified
- OB 383 – February 1, 2012 (Expired) Introduction of the Downloadable IMM 5455 Supplementary Identification Form
- OB 382 – January 31, 2012 Special Events – Specific Directives for Processing Foreign Mission and International Organizations Act (FMIOA) Temporary Resident Visa Applications for the Forum Mondial de la Langue Française ( SE Code 12FMLF)
- OB 380 – January 31, 2012 (Expired) Closure and Transfer of Visa and Immigration Services from the Canadian Embassy in Damascus, Syria, to Neighbouring Visa Offices
- OB 378 – January 20, 2012 (Expired) Sanctions against Iran
- OB 376 – January 19, 2012 (Expired) Issuing Refunds to MI-1 Applicants in GCMS
- OB 369 – January 17, 2012 Replacing the Principal Applicant on an Application for Permanent Residence by a Parent or Grandparent sponsored as a member of the Family Class
- OB 219 – January 9, 2012 (Modified) (Expired) Ministerial Instructions and Canadian Experience Class applications
- OB 225-E – January 6, 2012 Modified processing instructions for Information Technology work permit applications (software pilot) for British Columbia and Quebec

## All operational bulletins (by year)
